sql_array: CREATE TABLE timezone_test (id INT, local_time SEC_INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO timezone_test (id, local_time) VALUES (1, local_timezone());
UPDATE timezone_test SET local_time = local_timezone() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, local_time FROM timezone_test WHERE local_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, local_time + local_timezone() FROM timezone_test;
